subject: Your Mentora password has been changed
title: Password changed successfully
intro: Hi{{namePart}}, your Mentora account password was changed on {{timestamp}}.
successBox: Your password has been updated. All previous sessions have been invalidated.
warning: If you did not make this change, contact support immediately.
footerNote: This is a security notification for your Mentora account. Please do not share it with anyone.
plainTextBody: Your Mentora account password was changed successfully.
